title: SpaceFrog's FroggyCraft Datapack Tweaks
description: This is a datapack intended for use with the FroggyCraft modpack. It makes tweaks to recipes and world generation.
body: This datapack makes some quality of life tweaks like adding recipes for normally uncraftable items like barrier blocks. It tweaks world generation, removing floating islands. It differentiates between the types of corn in the modpack, making it clear when corn or maize is needed for different crafting recipes.
